channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: DOJ plans 'Truth and Justice Commission' to compensate allies: Sources
item.description: The Justice Department is finalizing an agreement to establish a commission that would process claims from alleged victims of government overreach.

item.title: Republican Senator Cassidy faces tough Louisiana primary challenge
item.description: Louisiana voters head to the polls Saturday for Senate primaries, with incumbent Bill Cassidy battling a Trump-backed opponent.

item.title: Long Island Rail Road workers strike after contract talks collapse
item.description: The strike follows a breakdown in negotiations for a new four-year contract, with the MTA and unions agreeing on the first three years but not the fourth.

item.title: Trump confirms killing of Islamic State leader in Nigeria
item.description: President Trump announced Friday that U.S. and Nigerian forces killed Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, a senior Islamic State leader.
